name: Marabou
run: vehicle compile -s spec.vcl -t MarabouQueries -o Marabou.queries --network acasXu:fake.onnx

name: MarabouVerify
run: vehicle verify -s spec.vcl --verifier Marabou --network acasXu:acasXu_1_7.onnx --property property3

name: ValidateJSON
run: vehicle verify -s spec.vcl -v TestVerifier --network acasXu:acasXu_1_7.onnx --property property3 --verifier-location=testVerifier --verifier-args='sat 'X_0=0.2,X_1=0.3,Y_0=3.0,X_2=0.2,X_3=0.2,X_4=0.2,Y_1=3.0,Y_2=3.0,Y_3=3.0,Y_4=3.0'' --cache verify-cache > /dev/null && vehicle validate --cache verify-cache --json
